agents.name: Project Manager
agents.role: Owns scope, priorities, dependency tracking, and team escalation.
agents.lastOutput: Split the refresh work into frontend, backend, QA, and review tasks.

agents.name: Solution Designer
agents.role: Turns requirements into flows, UX specs, and build-ready contracts.
agents.objective: Prepare the dashboard refresh acceptance criteria
agents.lastOutput: Documented success states, empty states, and mobile behavior.

agents.name: Frontend Engineer
agents.role: Builds user interfaces, frontend state, accessibility, and integration behavior.
agents.objective: Update the work board layout and activity feed
agents.lastOutput: Implemented responsive board columns and a compact activity panel.

agents.name: Backend Engineer
agents.role: Builds APIs, data models, validation, and backend test coverage.
agents.objective: Waiting for dashboard data contract changes
agents.lastOutput: Confirmed no API change is required for the current dashboard refresh.

agents.name: QA Engineer
agents.role: Validates requirements through reproducible tests, evidence, and release checks.
agents.objective: Validate dashboard refresh on desktop and mobile
agents.lastOutput: Desktop smoke passed; mobile evidence is waiting for a fresh browser run.

agents.name: Tech Lead
agents.role: Owns technical standards, code review, risk control, and deploy approval.
agents.lastOutput: Waiting for QA mobile evidence before final approval.
